titleStmt.title: SII 38.123: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 123. (A.R. No. 123 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the north wall, second prākāra, Ādhipurīśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Rājakēsarivarman Tribhuvanachchakkaravattigaḷ Rājarāja II Year 17: 1163 A.D.

summary.p: The end portion of the inscription is damaged. It begins with the meykīrtti of the ruler, Pumaruviya tirumādum etc., of the ruler.

Records that a certain Kulōttuṅgachōḻa Mahipālan, son of Āṟṟūr-nāḍāḻvan, a native of Eyilanūrnilai Āmūr alias Chōḷēndrasiṅganallūr-paḷḷi in Paiyyūr-kōṭṭam in Vikramachōḷa-vaḷanāḍu (a sub-division) of Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam made a gift of 96 cows for maintaining three perpetual lamps to the god of Tiruvoṟṟiyūr in Puḻaṟkōṭṭam. Two shepherds received the gift and agreed to supply one uḻakku of oil daily towards burning the lamps.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmaruviya tirumātum puvimātum jayamātum nā
maruviya kalaimātum pukaḻmātum nayantu pulka Arumaṟai viti
neṟi Aṉaittun taḻaippa varumuṟai Urimaiyil maṇimuṭi
cūṭit tiṅkaḷ veṇkuṭait ticaik kaḷiṟeṭṭu n=taṅku tanittiṭa
ntu nena viḷaṅka karuṅkalippaṭi yai ceṅkol turappa peru
kaliyāḻi puvi vaḷantuṭanvara villavarriṭṭar miṉavar kaliṅkar palla
va nutaliyar pārttivar paṇiya Eṇṇaruṅ kaṟpaka maṇṇakam puṇarn
tu cempon viraciṅṅācaṉattu puvanamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟ
ṟirun=taruḷiya kovirājakecaripanmarāṉa tiripuvanaccakkiravatti rājarāja
tevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 7 vatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭala
ttu vikkiramacoḻavaḷanāṭṭu paiyyūrkoṭṭattu Eyilnūr nilai Āmurā
na coḷen=tiraciṅkanallūr paḷḷiyāna Āṟṟūr nāṭāḻ makan ku
lottuṅkacoḻa mahipālanen puḻaṟkoṭṭattu Uṭaiyār tiru
voṟṟiyūruṭaiyāṟku vaitta tirinuntā viḷakku 3munṟum Ācan=ti
ra kālam celvatāka viṭṭa pacu toṇṇūṟṟāṟum tiripuvanacun=tara te
ruvil manṟāṭikaḷil piccan makan kuppan cann=tarama kaikko
ṇṭa tirinun=tāviḷakkonṟa (a)ṟaiyum viṭṭan Āccanāna pulakkaṭuvik ko
n kaikkoṇṭa tirinun=tā viḷakki Onṟaraiyum Ivviḷakku munṟum kai
k koṇṭu nittam Uḻakku ney Aḷakka kaṭavom Ivviruvom
mel māṅkāṭṭu nāṭṭu puliyūr koṭṭattu pūn=tamalli
makan kuṟuṅkāl nāna vātāvik kon makan tiruniṟṟuc coḻaṉ
n Uṭaiyār tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiyā
Digital edition of SII 38.123 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
